label: Creep joiner form kind
description: Defines a creep joiner arrival form -- the pawn-kind template controlling appearance, arrival letter text, and which benefit/downside/aggressive/rejection options are valid for this form. Inherits all PawnKindDef fields.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight used when choosing a random creep joiner form.

minCombatPoints.label: Min combat points
minCombatPoints.description: Minimum raid threat-point threshold required before this form can be randomly selected.

canOccurRandomly.label: Can occur randomly
canOccurRandomly.description: When false, excludes this form from random selection while still allowing explicit selection.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: One-line label shown in the creep joiner arrival notification. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterPrompt.label: Letter prompt
letterPrompt.description: Body text of the creep joiner arrival letter describing this form's appearance and situation. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

bodyTypeGraphicPaths.label: Body type graphic paths
bodyTypeGraphicPaths.description: Per-body-type texture paths used to render this creep joiner form. Child element name is the BodyTypeDef defName; text is the texture atlas path.

forcedHeadTypes.label: Forced head types
forcedHeadTypes.description: Restricts the head types available for this creep joiner form. When set, only the listed HeadTypeDefs are used during pawn generation.

hairTagFilter.label: Hair tag filter
hairTagFilter.description: Whitelist or blacklist of hair style tags applied when generating this creep joiner form.

beardTagFilter.label: Beard tag filter
beardTagFilter.description: Whitelist or blacklist of beard style tags applied when generating this creep joiner form.

hairColorOverride.label: Hair color override
hairColorOverride.description: Optional hair color forced onto pawns generated with this creep joiner form. Absent element means no override (null).

excludes.label: Excludes
excludes.description: Blacklists compatible CreepJoiner choices for this form. References any concrete CreepJoinerBaseDef subtype (benefit, downside, aggressive, or rejection).

requires.label: Requires
requires.description: Whitelists compatible CreepJoiner choices for this form. References any concrete CreepJoinerBaseDef subtype (benefit, downside, aggressive, or rejection).
